title: Dispatch orders
subtitle: Scan order QR codes, then select a courier when assigning
pagePurpose: This page is for scanning 10-20 order QR codes and assigning them all to one courier.
couriersEmptyDescription: The courier list for this branch came back empty. Once /couriers returns couriers, select one here and assign scanned orders.
couriersLoadError: Could not load couriers. You can still scan orders, but retry before assigning.
scannerSubtitle: Only order QR codes are accepted
scannerWaiting: Camera is waiting for a QR code
cameraClosedHint: Press Scan to read QR codes with the phone camera.
keyboardScannerHint: Hardware scanner input is accepted automatically. Press Scan only when you need the phone camera.
lockedHint: After a courier is selected, scanned order QR codes can be added to the assignment list. The phone camera opens only after pressing Scan.
pendingHint: Scanned orders are temporarily stored here
scanOrdersHint: Hardware scanner input adds orders to this list. Press Scan when you need the phone camera.
invalidQr: This QR code is not valid for dispatch
duplicateOrder: This order is already in the list
wrongType: Only order QR codes can be scanned
slowLoading: The response is slower than usual. Waiting for the network or server.
courierPopupDescription: {{count}} orders will be assigned to this courier
